stocks.impact_theory: Event: DOJ legal opinion and potential federal intervention allowing restart of Santa Ynez Unit offshore platforms amid soaring oil prices from U.S.-Iran conflict escalation. Economic implications: Boosts U.S. domestic oil supply, supports energy independence. Market psychology: FOMO buying on small-cap energy play with 100%+ monthly gains. Historical parallels: Similar surges in offshore stocks during 2022 Ukraine crisis oil spikes. Analogies: Like a dam breaking - pent-up production floods market; rocket fuel for shortsqueeze.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: X sentiment highly positive with mentions of raging back; news on Trump intervention, DOJ opinion driving momentum. Oil >$95 supports. Web searches confirm monthly top gainer.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for 20-30% gains on production restart catalyst; target $22.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Avoid or short on profit-taking post-spike, potential -10%.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Regulatory delays, oil price retreat, geopolitical de-escalation.

stocks.justification: Multiple confirming news sources, top monthly gainer, high X engagement.

stocks.impact_theory: Event: Issued strong FY2026 guidance with 70%+ revenue growth, ESOP registration, analyst upgrades. Economic implications: Positions in EV/AI battery demand boom. Market psychology: Short squeeze + growth hype. Historical parallels: Battery stocks like QS in 2021. Analogies: Like planting seeds in fertile soil - guidance waters explosive growth; snowball rolling downhill.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: News on 54% surge post-guidance; X trending as monthly rocket. Positive analyst sentiment.

potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Execution misses, competition from CATL, market rotation.

stocks.impact_theory: Event: New lucrative project awards, Q4 results, 52w high. Economic implications: Benefits from energy transition/infra spend. Market psychology: Multi-bagger YTD run continues. Historical parallels: Industrial turnarounds like NOC in 2023. Analogies: Phoenix rising from ashes; dam bursting with orders.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: X lists as top rocket; news on project starts, new highs.

potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Earnings miss upcoming Mar 16, debt levels.

stocks.justification: Momentum strong but upcoming earnings risk.

stocks.impact_theory: Event: Oil spike to $100+ from Iran war, wide refinery margins. Economic implications: Higher crack spreads boost profits. Market psychology: Energy sector crush amid geopolitics. Historical parallels: 2022 refinery rally. Analogies: Refinery as money printer during oil volatility; surfer riding geopolitical wave.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Up 26% month per X; institutional buying.

stocks.justification: Macro tailwinds from oil, confirmed volume.

stocks.impact_theory: Event: Q1 earnings beat ($6.4B rev) but CEO Shantanu Narayen stepping down after 18yrs, AI cannibalization fears. Economic implications: Leadership transition in AI era. Market psychology: Sell on news, uncertainty. Historical parallels: MSFT post-Ballmer. Analogies: Captain abandoning ship mid-storm; rug pull on AI hype.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Stock down 9% despite beat; X heavy negative on CEO exit, AI threats.

stocks.justification: Clear catalyst from earnings/CEO, high volume reaction.
